steps.action: Navigate to /admin/login and login as admin
steps.observed: Redirected to /admin/dashboard with stats visible

steps.expected: Events management page with event list
steps.observed: Events page showing 12 events with Create Event button
Form with title, type, date, venue, price, description fields appeared
Team 1 name, Team 2 name, and flag URL fields appeared

steps.action: Fill form: title='Validator Test Match', type=football, team1='Brazil', team2='Germany', date='2026-06-15T18:00', venue='Test Stadium', price=55
steps.observed: All fields filled correctly

steps.expected: Event created and appears in list
steps.observed: Event created, list now shows 13 events with 'Validator Test Match' visible at top

evidence.network: Event creation successful - event appeared in list after form submission

steps.action: Click Edit button on 'Validator Test Match' event
steps.expected: Edit form opens with pre-filled data
steps.observed: Edit form opened with Football type selected, Save button visible

steps.action: Change venue to 'Updated Stadium' and click Save
steps.expected: Event updated, venue changes in list
steps.observed: Event updated, venue changed to 'Updated Stadium' in list

steps.action: Click Delete button on 'Validator Test Match'
steps.observed: Confirmation dialog: 'Are you sure you want to delete Validator Test Match? This action cannot be undone.' with Cancel and Delete buttons
Event deleted, list reduced from 13 to 12 events

evidence.network: Edit and delete operations successful - changes reflected in event list

steps.expected: Users management page with user list
steps.observed: User Management page displayed with 2 users

steps.expected: Email, VIP level, account status visible
steps.observed: Table shows: EMAIL, NAME, VIP LEVEL, ROLE, ACCOUNT STATUS, CREATED DATE columns
admin@example.com (VIP8, Admin) and test@example.com (VIP2, Active) displayed with avatars

steps.expected: Orders management page with all orders
steps.observed: Order Management page showing 2 orders with Status Filter dropdown set to 'All'

steps.action: Verify orders list shows all orders
steps.observed: 2 orders visible: ORD-2026-001235 (Phoenix Suns VS Los Angeles Lakers, $145.00, To be paid) and ORD-2026-001234 (Lionel Messi #10, $299.98, Paid)
1 order shown: ORD-2026-001234 with 'Paid' status badge
1 order shown: ORD-2026-001235 with 'To be paid' status badge

evidence.network: Orders list and filtering loaded successfully

assertions.title: Admin creates event visible in correct tab

steps.action: Admin creates football event 'Validator Cross Test Match' (TestTeamA vs TestTeamB)
steps.expected: Event created successfully in admin panel
steps.observed: Event created and visible in admin events list as Football type

steps.action: Login as regular user in second browser session (375x812 viewport)
steps.observed: Logged in as test@example.com, redirected to home page
TestTeamA VS TestTeamB visible at bottom of football tab with correct details (Jul 20, 2026, Cross Test Arena, $75.00)
Only basketball games shown (Phoenix Suns, LA Lakers, etc.) - no TestTeamA/TestTeamB
Only concert events shown (Taylor Swift, Ed Sheeran, The Weeknd) - no TestTeamA/TestTeamB

steps.action: Clean up: Admin deletes the test event
steps.observed: Event deleted from admin panel after confirmation

evidence.network: Event creation and retrieval across tabs working correctly

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed. All admin event CRUD operations (create, edit, delete), users list, orders with filtering, and cross-area event visibility work correctly.
